title: Great App
text: Very easy to use and track my mutual funds. The interface is clean.

title: KYC Issue
text: My KYC has been pending for 2 weeks. Very frustrating. No support response.

title: Payment Failed
text: Tried to invest via UPI but the transaction failed twice. Money got deducted but not reflecting.

title: Good but slow
text: The app is good but takes a lot of time to load the portfolio page.

title: Best for SBI users
text: Since I have an SBI account, integration is seamless. Love the SIP feature.

title: Withdrawal stuck
text: I initiated a redemption 3 days ago, still haven't received the funds. Support is useless.

title: UI could be better
text: The new update changed the layout. It's confusing now to find the 'invest more' button.

title: Login loop
text: The app keeps asking for OTP again and again. Unable to login since morning.

title: Excellent tracking
text: The portfolio tracking feature is better than many competitors.

title: KYC rejected again
text: They rejected my documents for the third time without telling why. Moving to Groww.

title: Helpful support
text: Had a query about my SIP, the chat support resolved it within 10 minutes.

title: UPI transaction error
text: Constant 'technical error' during payment. Please fix the UPI gateway.

title: Simple and effective
text: Does exactly what it says. No clutter.

title: Unable to track SIP
text: My SIP amount is deducted but I can't see the units in the app.

title: Average experience
text: Functional but needs more scheme details like exit load and expense ratio clearly visible.
